scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.ci:check: npm run ci:check:backend && npm run ci:check:frontend
scripts.ci:check:backend: npm run type-check --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.ci:check:frontend: npm run type-check --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run test --workspace=frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 npm run build --workspace=frontend
